case_title: BARBARA ANN BERWICK VS. 21ST CENTURY INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BERWICK, BARBARA ANN AS TO DEFENDANT 21ST CENTURY INSURANCE COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-12-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-12-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF BARBARA ANN BERWICK. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK S. LE, NOT REPORTED (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SEE SIGNATURE SERVED MAR-21-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT 21ST CENTURY INSURANCE COMPANY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-12-2017 - JUDGMENT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
(SC-108) REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BERWICK, BARBARA ANN
ORDER DENYING REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $90.00 FILED BY BERWICK, BARBARA ANN AS TO DEFENDANT 21ST CENTURY INSURANCE COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-12-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BERWICK, BARBARA ANN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT 21ST CENTURY INSURANCE COMPANY THERE IS NO AUTHORITY FOR THE FILING OF A PRIVATE CLAIM FOR A VIOLATION OF SAN FRANCISCO MANDATORY RECYCLING AND COMPOSTING ORDINANCE NO. 100-09 AND THERE WAS NO PROOF OF ANY AGREEMENT BETWEEN THE PARTIES PROVIDING FOR PAYMENT TO PLAINTIFF FOR ANY SERVICES UNDER THE ORDINANCE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
